label: Pawn flyer properties
description: Properties for pawn flyer things that carry a pawn through the air when launched by an ability or effect.

flyingDef.label: Flying def
flyingDef.description: ThingDef used for the airborne pawn while it is in flight.

flightSpeed.label: Flight speed
flightSpeed.description: Speed of the airborne pawn in cells per second.

flightEffecterDef.label: Flight effecter def
flightEffecterDef.description: EffecterDef played at the flyer's position during flight.

flightEffecterScaleWithRange.label: Flight effecter scale with range
flightEffecterScaleWithRange.description: If true, the flight effecter size scales with the flight distance.

soundLanding.label: Sound landing
soundLanding.description: SoundDef played when the pawn lands.
